name: Strawberry Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and water in a saucepan. Bring mixture to a boil and stir constantly.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook until the temperature reaches 252°F (126°C), as determined by the soft ball stage test: drop a small amount of the mixture into a cold cup of water; if it becomes stiff and hard, it is ready.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gradually add the beaten jello to the egg whites and continue beating until the mixture forms a peak.
4. Slowly pour the hot syrup in thin streams over the egg white-jello mixture. Beat until the mixture loses its gloss and holds its shape.
5. Gently fold in the coconut and chopped pecans.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto waxed paper.
7. Allow the candies to set until they are hard before serving.
